data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for reporting on breach rates and compensation costs.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to report on breach rates and compensation costs. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete data or endpoints that confirm the existence of such reporting capabilities. The linked use case mentions the need for reporting but lacks specific evidence to validate this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No concrete evidence of reporting mechanisms for breach rates and compensation costs.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the reporting requirement.
